chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer App. No. S – 20 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.2 at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.249/2024 (Ex.) 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.250/2024 (Stay) 26.02.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Accordingly, this civil transfer application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
